feats.name: Blessings of Devotion
feats.description_markdown:
Your early training taught you to sanctify the moment with decisive clarity.

Choose yourself or an ally within **close** range.  
Until the end of their next turn, they gain:

- **+2** to their next **Skill Check** **OR** **Attack Roll**

If that roll is a **critical success**, you regain **1 Ambition** (once per respite).
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 2 AP | **Duration** 1 Minute  
Your early training taught you to sanctify the moment with decisive clarity.

Choose yourself or an ally within **close** range.  
Until the end of their next turn, they gain:

- **+2** to their next **Skill Check** **OR** **Attack Roll**

If that roll is a **critical success**, you regain **1 Ambition** (once per respite).

feats.name: Ritual Adept
feats.description_markdown:
Your upbringing refined your understanding of sacred practices.

You gain:

- **Resolve** on Skill Checks to identify or interpret **rituals, divine symbols, sacred writings, or divine magic**
    
- Perform **non-combat ritual actions** in **half the normal time**
    
- Once per **long rest**, you may grant **+1 DC Tier** to a ritual when assisting another caster
    

This does _not_ grant spellcasting or ritual slots.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive  
Your upbringing refined your understanding of sacred practices.

You gain:

- **Resolve** on Skill Checks to identify or interpret **rituals, divine symbols, sacred writings, or divine magic**
    
- Perform **non-combat ritual actions** in **half the normal time**
    
- Once per **long rest**, you may grant **+1 DC Tier** to a ritual when assisting another caster
    

This does _not_ grant spellcasting or ritual slots.

feats.name: Sanctified Bearing
feats.description_markdown:
Your disciplined upbringing grants an unshakable presence.

- **+1 Will Defense**
    
- **Resolve** on checks to resist **fear**, **charm**, and **compel** effects
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive  
Your disciplined upbringing grants an unshakable presence.

- **+1 Will Defense**
    
- **Resolve** on checks to resist **fear**, **charm**, and **compel** effects

feats.name: Insightful Wisdom
feats.description_markdown:
You provides clarity in moments of doubt.

Choose a creature within range to gain one **benefit**:

- Remove **Strain** from one attack
- Give Resolve on a **Social** or **Intuition** check
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 2 AP | **Range** Close | **Duration** 1 Minute  
You provides clarity in moments of doubt.

Choose a creature within range to gain one **benefit**:

- Remove **Strain** from one attack
- Give Resolve on a **Social** or **Intuition** check

feats.name: Devout Fortitude
feats.description_markdown:
Your devotion reinforces body and spirit in moments of danger.

You gain:
- +2 maximum **Vitality**
- +1 to **Body** Defense
- When you roll **Ambition** on a saving throw (any defense), you may treat results of **1** as **2** instead.    

Once per **Respite**, when you would gain **Weakened**, you instead ignore it.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Passive  
Your devotion reinforces body and spirit in moments of danger.

You gain:
- +2 maximum **Vitality**
- +1 to **Body** Defense
- When you roll **Ambition** on a saving throw (any defense), you may treat results of **1** as **2** instead.    

Once per **Respite**, when you would gain **Weakened**, you instead ignore it.

feats.name: Channeled Focus
feats.description_markdown:
Your training allows you to anchor the spiritual flow around you.

Choose a creature within **close** range.  
Until the end of their next turn, they gain **one** of the following:

- +2 to **Spell Attacks** 
- +1 to **Spell DC**
- **Resistance** to **ether**, **divine**, or **elemental** damage (choose one)

If the creature uses a **Spell** while this is active and have a **critical success**, you regain 1 **Reservoir** or **Ambition** once per target per **Long Rest**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 2 AP | **Duration** 1 Minute
Your training allows you to anchor the spiritual flow around you.

Choose a creature within **close** range.  
Until the end of their next turn, they gain **one** of the following:

- +2 to **Spell Attacks** 
- +1 to **Spell DC**
- **Resistance** to **ether**, **divine**, or **elemental** damage (choose one)

If the creature uses a **Spell** while this is active and have a **critical success**, you regain 1 **Reservoir** or **Ambition** once per target per **Long Rest**.

feats.name: Tenets of Discipline
feats.description_markdown:
Your early religious instruction instilled a rigid mental discipline.

You gain:
- **Resolve** on skill checks involving **concentration, meditation, vigilance, or resisting distraction**
- +2 **Mind** Defense
    

In addition, once per **respite**, when you would lose **Ambition** from stress or failure, you do not lose **Ambition**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Passive  
Your early religious instruction instilled a rigid mental discipline.

You gain:
- **Resolve** on skill checks involving **concentration, meditation, vigilance, or resisting distraction**
- +2 **Mind** Defense
    

In addition, once per **respite**, when you would lose **Ambition** from stress or failure, you do not lose **Ambition**.

feats.name: Consecrated Action
feats.description_markdown:
Your movements carry spiritual weight, letting you mark the moment with sacred authority. When you **hit** or **succeed** on **Skill check** (Social, Lore, Intuition, or Awareness) against a target.

You may apply one of the following effects to the target:

- **Dazed** (1 round)
- **Sapped** (1 round)  
- Your next **attack** against them has **Resolve**    
- An ally within **Close** range gains +2 to their next roll against them

On a **critical success** this may instead apply **Frightened (1 round)**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** 1 AP  
Your movements carry spiritual weight, letting you mark the moment with sacred authority. When you **hit** or **succeed** on **Skill check** (Social, Lore, Intuition, or Awareness) against a target.

You may apply one of the following effects to the target:

- **Dazed** (1 round)
- **Sapped** (1 round)  
- Your next **attack** against them has **Resolve**    
- An ally within **Close** range gains +2 to their next roll against them

On a **critical success** this may instead apply **Frightened (1 round)**.

feats.name: Sacrosanct Vigor
feats.description_markdown:
Your spirit hardens your flesh; your faith reinforces your life force.

You gain:

- **+5 Maximum Vitality**   
- **+1 to all three Defenses (Body, Mind, Will)**
- When you receive healing from any source, restore an additional **+1d4 Vitality**

Additionally, once per **full rest**, when you would be reduced to **0 vitality**, instead remain at **1 vitality** and gain **Dodge**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *2 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Passive  
Your spirit hardens your flesh; your faith reinforces your life force.

You gain:

- **+5 Maximum Vitality**   
- **+1 to all three Defenses (Body, Mind, Will)**
- When you receive healing from any source, restore an additional **+1d4 Vitality**

Additionally, once per **full rest**, when you would be reduced to **0 vitality**, instead remain at **1 vitality** and gain **Dodge**.

feats.name: Rite of Binding
feats.description_markdown:
Your ritual training lets you bind foes with sacred force. When a creature within **Close** range attempts to **move**, **dash**, **disengage**, or take a **mobility** action.

Make an opposing **Will check** against their **Will Defense**.

-  On **success**, the action is **canceled**, and the creature is **Slowed** until the end of its next turn.

-  On **critical success**, the creature becomes **Restrained** for 1 round.    

Once per **respite**, if this cancels a movement that would leave **engagement** with an ally, the ally also gains **+2 to Attacks** until the end of their next turn.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *2 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** 2 AP  
Your ritual training lets you bind foes with sacred force. When a creature within **Close** range attempts to **move**, **dash**, **disengage**, or take a **mobility** action.

Make an opposing **Will check** against their **Will Defense**.

-  On **success**, the action is **canceled**, and the creature is **Slowed** until the end of its next turn.

-  On **critical success**, the creature becomes **Restrained** for 1 round.    

Once per **respite**, if this cancels a movement that would leave **engagement** with an ally, the ally also gains **+2 to Attacks** until the end of their next turn.

feats.name: Mantle of Reverence
feats.description_markdown:
You manifest the presence of your faith as a commanding aura.

Creatures of your choice within **Close** range gain one of the following:

- +2 to all **Attack Rolls**
- +2 to all **Stat** Defense
- Resolve on **Intuition** and **Social** checks

Once per target, enemies entering your **Engagement** during this effect must make a **Will** check against your **Mind**, or suffer **Strain** on their next attack.

Once per **long rest**, you may instead extend the duration to **2 rounds**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *2 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 1 AP | **Duration** 1 Round  
You manifest the presence of your faith as a commanding aura.

Creatures of your choice within **Close** range gain one of the following:

- +2 to all **Attack Rolls**
- +2 to all **Stat** Defense
- Resolve on **Intuition** and **Social** checks

Once per target, enemies entering your **Engagement** during this effect must make a **Will** check against your **Mind**, or suffer **Strain** on their next attack.

Once per **long rest**, you may instead extend the duration to **2 rounds**.

feats.name: Sacred Insight
feats.description_markdown:
You’ve been shaped by years of study, meditation, and spiritual training.

You gain:

- **Resolve** on any roll involving **forewarning**, **intuition**, **omen-reading**, or **discerning truth**
- You may reroll one failed **attack roll** or **skill check** per **respite**
- When you would be affected by a **hidden** danger (trap, ambush, deceit, magical effect), you may use your **Mind** instead of **Body** or **Will** (your choice)    

Additionally, when you succeed you and all allies within **Nearby** gain +2 to their **Defense** from the same **hidden** danger until the start of their next turn.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *2 Acolyte Feats*
**Trait** Passive  
You’ve been shaped by years of study, meditation, and spiritual training.

You gain:

- **Resolve** on any roll involving **forewarning**, **intuition**, **omen-reading**, or **discerning truth**
- You may reroll one failed **attack roll** or **skill check** per **respite**
- When you would be affected by a **hidden** danger (trap, ambush, deceit, magical effect), you may use your **Mind** instead of **Body** or **Will** (your choice)    

Additionally, when you succeed you and all allies within **Nearby** gain +2 to their **Defense** from the same **hidden** danger until the start of their next turn.

feats.name: Guiding Voice
feats.description_markdown: You are able to inspire those around you even at a distance. Choose a target within range, they gain +2 to their next **Skill Check** or **Attack Roll**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 1 AP | **Range** Close | **Duration** 1 Round
You are able to inspire those around you even at a distance. Choose a target within range, they gain +2 to their next **Skill Check** or **Attack Roll**.

feats.name: Look For An Opening
feats.description_markdown: You are able to see openings at a distance. Once per target, you cause the same effect as a **Flank**. After you use this, the target is immune for 1 minute to this feature.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 2 AP | **Range** Close
You are able to see openings at a distance. Once per target, you cause the same effect as a **Flank**. After you use this, the target is immune for 1 minute to this feature.

feats.name: Form Up
feats.description_markdown: When you're using a **shield** and an ally in your **engagement** is attacked, you may use your shield's **Reduction Pool** to take the damage.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** - 
When you're using a **shield** and an ally in your **engagement** is attacked, you may use your shield's **Reduction Pool** to take the damage.

feats.name: Quick Feet
feats.description_markdown: Once per **respite**, you may reduce the cost of **Dash**, **Disengage** or **Dodge** by 1 AP.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** - 
Once per **respite**, you may reduce the cost of **Dash**, **Disengage** or **Dodge** by 1 AP.

feats.name: Fated Resolve
feats.description_markdown: Whenever you roll a 1 on a **d20** or on one d6 doing **Skill Check**, you may reroll the a single dice one.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** Free Action
Whenever you roll a 1 on a **d20** or on one d6 doing **Skill Check**, you may reroll the a single dice one.

feats.name: Sign of Fate
feats.description_markdown:
You have a birthmark which has been said to match the **Star** you were born under. Based on your chosen **Star** you gain the following.

| Star      | Boon                                       |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| Warrior   | +1 to **Armor Defense** when wearing Armor |
| Mother    | +1 Success on all **Medicine** checks      |
| Trickster | +1 Success on all **Stealth** checks       |
| Lord      | +1 to **Will**                             |
| Magi      | +1 to **Mind**                             |
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** -
You have a birthmark which has been said to match the **Star** you were born under. Based on your chosen **Star** you gain the following.

| Star      | Boon                                       |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| Warrior   | +1 to **Armor Defense** when wearing Armor |
| Mother    | +1 Success on all **Medicine** checks      |
| Trickster | +1 Success on all **Stealth** checks       |
| Lord      | +1 to **Will**                             |
| Magi      | +1 to **Mind**                             |

feats.name: Adept Learner
feats.description_markdown:
You gain one proficiency that you do not already have in one of the following groups.
- **V.I.T.I.A.L.S**
- **Tools**
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** - 
You gain one proficiency that you do not already have in one of the following groups.
- **V.I.T.I.A.L.S**
- **Tools**

You are able to inspire those around you even at a distance. Choose a target within range, they gain +2 to their next **Skill Check** or **Attack Roll**.

- You may reroll one failed **attack roll** or **skill check** per **respite**
- When you would be affected by a **hidden** danger (trap, ambush, deceit, magical effect), you may use your **Mind** instead of **Body** or **Will** (your choice)    

Additionally, when you succeed you and all allies within **Nearby** gain +2 to their **Defense** from the same **hidden** danger until the start of their next turn.

You gain:

- You may reroll one failed **attack roll** or **skill check** per **respite**

feats.name: Quick Repair
feats.description_markdown: You can select an object with in range and restore it. If the object was **non-magical** and **non-organic**, and has either a **Reduction Pool** or **Vitality**, you can restore it up to 2d6 once per day.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 2 AP | **Range** Touch 
You can select an object with in range and restore it. If the object was **non-magical** and **non-organic**, and has either a **Reduction Pool** or **Vitality**, you can restore it up to 2d6 once per day.

feats.name: Read The Room
feats.description_markdown: You may use **Will** in place of **Mind** when using the **Perception** or **Scan** action against targets in **range**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive| **Range** Close
You may use **Will** in place of **Mind** when using the **Perception** or **Scan** action against targets in **range**.

feats.name: Iron Gut
feats.description_markdown: You are use to dealing with concoctions that would make even the strongest men churn. You gain **resistance** to **Poison** damage, and **Resolve** on checks for resisting the **Poisoned** condition.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive 
You are use to dealing with concoctions that would make even the strongest men churn. You gain **resistance** to **Poison** damage, and **Resolve** on checks for resisting the **Poisoned** condition.

feats.name: Broken As Well
feats.description_markdown: When you land a **Critical Hit** or are struck by a **Critical Hit**, you may choose one target within range to suffer 1d4 penalty to **Attack Rolls** until the end of your next turn. The target is considered to be **Hexed**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger  | **Range** Nearby
When you land a **Critical Hit** or are struck by a **Critical Hit**, you may choose one target within range to suffer 1d4 penalty to **Attack Rolls** until the end of your next turn. The target is considered to be **Hexed**.

feats.name: Bond Mark
feats.description_markdown: You mark one willing creature, as long as this creature is within 1 mile, both of you can sense each others **emotions** and **vitals**. You are also unable to lie to each other.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility |**Cost** 1 AP | **Range** Touch
You mark one willing creature, as long as this creature is within 1 mile, both of you can sense each others **emotions** and **vitals**. You are also unable to lie to each other.

feats.name: Forbidden Knowledge
feats.description_markdown: When dealing with matters revolving around **Forbidden** lore and research, you have **Resolve** on **Skill Checks** related to it.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
When dealing with matters revolving around **Forbidden** lore and research, you have **Resolve** on **Skill Checks** related to it.

feats.name: Freedom of Movement
feats.description_markdown: Your **Mobile** feat can now be used once per turn.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Required** *Tier 4 Courier* | **Path Investment** *4 Guildmate Feats* 
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** - 
Your **Mobile** feat can now be used once per turn.

feats.name: Sphere Access
feats.description_markdown: You gain access to one **Sphere of Magic** that you do not already have. You gain one additional **Spell** that does not count against your current **Known Spells**
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You gain access to one **Sphere of Magic** that you do not already have. You gain one additional **Spell** that does not count against your current **Known Spells**

feats.name: Reckless Casting
feats.description_markdown: You care not for safety and need your spells to active regardless. Once per **Long Rest**, you spend **Ambition** equal to three times the tier of a **Spell**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 3 Ambition per Spell Tier
You care not for safety and need your spells to active regardless. Once per **Long Rest**, you spend **Ambition** equal to three times the tier of a **Spell**.

feats.name: Chaos Magic
feats.description_markdown:
Your spellcasting grows unstable. You gain additional **2 Reservoir**.  
Whenever you cast a **spell of Tier 1** or **higher**, roll a **Chaos Die** (starting at d12).  
- On a roll of 1, activate the **Chaos Table**.  
- On any other result, degrade the **Chaos Die** one step (d12 → d10 → d8 → d6 → d4).  

After triggering the **Chaos Table**, the **Chaos Die** resets to d12.

**Chaos Table**

| d12    | Chaos Effect                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **1**  | **Backfire** The spell fizzles. You take **1d4 arcane damage** and the spell has no effect.                                                                                                                                             |
| **2**  | **Spell Ricochet** The spell re-targets a random nearby creature. Costs no AP but still consumes resources. Roll a d6 **even numbers** target an enemy of choice, **odd numbers** target an ally of choice.                             |
| **3**  | **Ethereal Flicker** You partially phase out. Gain **Dodge** but suffer **–2 to Spell Attacks** until the start of your next turn.                                                                                                      |
| **4**  | **Chaos Pulse:** All creatures within **Close** range take 1d4 **arcane** damage.                                                                                                                                                       |
| **5**  | **Sideways Spells** For your next two turns, you gain **+1 Spell DC** but suffer **–1 Spell Attack**.                                                                                                                                   |
| **6**  | **Mind Spark** Your head emits flickering light, acting as a **torch**. Gain **+1 Mind Defense** for 1 round, and light for 1 hour.                                                                                                     |
| **7**  | **Twisted Intent** Your spell’s effect warps. It gains **1d12 damage** or 1d6 added to **Spell Attack**, but you gain **Weakened 1** and 1 **Wound**.                                                                                   |
| **8**  | **Spectral Hands** Ghostly hands manifest. You may immediately take a free **Assist** or and additional **Interact** action.                                                                                                            |
| **9**  | **Reservoir Overflow** You regain **1 Ambition or 1 Reservoir** (your choice; cannot exceed max).                                                                                                                                       |
| **10** | **Crackling Chaos** Residual energy crackles. Your next spell gains **Resolve** on its **Spell Attack**, but causes a loud noise that can be heard from 1 mile away.                                                                    |
| **11** | **Slipstream** A distortion in reality opens, You swap places with one chosen target within **Close** range. When you re-appear everyone with **touch** (including yourself) takes 1d4 **Arcane** damage.                               |
| **12** | **Reality Bends:** Colors invert, sounds distort, gravity ripples. For the next 10 minutes you have **Strain** on **Skill Checks** related to **Awareness** and **Intution**, but **Resolve** on **Vigor**, **Talent**, and **Social**. |
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive  
Your spellcasting grows unstable. You gain additional **2 Reservoir**.  
Whenever you cast a **spell of Tier 1** or **higher**, roll a **Chaos Die** (starting at d12).  
- On a roll of 1, activate the **Chaos Table**.  
- On any other result, degrade the **Chaos Die** one step (d12 → d10 → d8 → d6 → d4).  

After triggering the **Chaos Table**, the **Chaos Die** resets to d12.

**Chaos Table**

| d12    | Chaos Effect                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **1**  | **Backfire** The spell fizzles. You take **1d4 arcane damage** and the spell has no effect.                                                                                                                                             |
| **2**  | **Spell Ricochet** The spell re-targets a random nearby creature. Costs no AP but still consumes resources. Roll a d6 **even numbers** target an enemy of choice, **odd numbers** target an ally of choice.                             |
| **3**  | **Ethereal Flicker** You partially phase out. Gain **Dodge** but suffer **–2 to Spell Attacks** until the start of your next turn.                                                                                                      |
| **4**  | **Chaos Pulse:** All creatures within **Close** range take 1d4 **arcane** damage.                                                                                                                                                       |
| **5**  | **Sideways Spells** For your next two turns, you gain **+1 Spell DC** but suffer **–1 Spell Attack**.                                                                                                                                   |
| **6**  | **Mind Spark** Your head emits flickering light, acting as a **torch**. Gain **+1 Mind Defense** for 1 round, and light for 1 hour.                                                                                                     |
| **7**  | **Twisted Intent** Your spell’s effect warps. It gains **1d12 damage** or 1d6 added to **Spell Attack**, but you gain **Weakened 1** and 1 **Wound**.                                                                                   |
| **8**  | **Spectral Hands** Ghostly hands manifest. You may immediately take a free **Assist** or and additional **Interact** action.                                                                                                            |
| **9**  | **Reservoir Overflow** You regain **1 Ambition or 1 Reservoir** (your choice; cannot exceed max).                                                                                                                                       |
| **10** | **Crackling Chaos** Residual energy crackles. Your next spell gains **Resolve** on its **Spell Attack**, but causes a loud noise that can be heard from 1 mile away.                                                                    |
| **11** | **Slipstream** A distortion in reality opens, You swap places with one chosen target within **Close** range. When you re-appear everyone with **touch** (including yourself) takes 1d4 **Arcane** damage.                               |
| **12** | **Reality Bends:** Colors invert, sounds distort, gravity ripples. For the next 10 minutes you have **Strain** on **Skill Checks** related to **Awareness** and **Intution**, but **Resolve** on **Vigor**, **Talent**, and **Social**. |

feats.name: Nature's Companion
feats.description_markdown:
You gain a **Wildlife** companion that strengthens as you do. The creature's size is **small** and cannot be used as a **mount** unless mounted by a **tiny** creature. Pick one of the following **Traits** for the companion to have to determine stats.

>**Nature Companion**
> _Wildlife / Neutral_ | **Lore** _Nature_  (*small*)
> **Vitality** 8 + your **Tier** | **Defense** 11 + your **Tier**  
> **Body** 8 + your **Tier** |  **Mind** 6  | **Will** 6  
> **Attacks** 1d6 based on **Trait**  
> **AP** 3


| Trait        | Attack           | Special                                                                                                                    |
| ------------ | ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Tracker**  | 1d6 **Puncture** | Gain **Resolve** on **Lore** (Nature) and **Intuition** checks to track or identify wildlife.                              |
| **Prowler**  | 1d6 **Slash**    | Gain **Resolve** on **Stealth** checks; enemies have **Strain** to detect it while in dim-light or foliage.                |
| **Guardian** | 1d6 **Blunt**    | When in the same **engagement**, you gain +1 **Armor Defense**; the companion can use **Distract** for 1 AP once per turn. |
| **Burrower** | 1d6 **Blunt**    | Ignores difficult terrain and grants you **Resolve** on finding natural hazards or hidden burrows.                         |
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** - 
You gain a **Wildlife** companion that strengthens as you do. The creature's size is **small** and cannot be used as a **mount** unless mounted by a **tiny** creature. Pick one of the following **Traits** for the companion to have to determine stats.

>**Nature Companion**
> _Wildlife / Neutral_ | **Lore** _Nature_  (*small*)
> **Vitality** 8 + your **Tier** | **Defense** 11 + your **Tier**  
> **Body** 8 + your **Tier** |  **Mind** 6  | **Will** 6  
> **Attacks** 1d6 based on **Trait**  
> **AP** 3


| Trait        | Attack           | Special                                                                                                                    |
| ------------ | ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Tracker**  | 1d6 **Puncture** | Gain **Resolve** on **Lore** (Nature) and **Intuition** checks to track or identify wildlife.                              |
| **Prowler**  | 1d6 **Slash**    | Gain **Resolve** on **Stealth** checks; enemies have **Strain** to detect it while in dim-light or foliage.                |
| **Guardian** | 1d6 **Blunt**    | When in the same **engagement**, you gain +1 **Armor Defense**; the companion can use **Distract** for 1 AP once per turn. |
| **Burrower** | 1d6 **Blunt**    | Ignores difficult terrain and grants you **Resolve** on finding natural hazards or hidden burrows.                         |

feats.name: Live Off The Land
feats.description_markdown: You know how to forage and collect resources. You gain **proficiency** in **Awareness** and **Outrider** tools.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Narrative | **Cost** -
You know how to forage and collect resources. You gain **proficiency** in **Awareness** and **Outrider** tools.

feats.name: Hawk-eyes
feats.description_markdown: Creatures attempting to become **Unaware** or **Hidden** from you have **Strain** on their **Stealth Check**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** -
Creatures attempting to become **Unaware** or **Hidden** from you have **Strain** on their **Stealth Check**.

feats.name: Worth the Risk
feats.description_markdown: Only those that take risks are the ones who survive. When rolling with **Ambition** and would fail a **Skill Check**, you may reroll up to 2d6 to try and succeed. However if you still **fail** the check, you loss **Ambition** equal to the amount rolled on your **Ambition** die, this cannot be reduced.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** Free Action
Only those that take risks are the ones who survive. When rolling with **Ambition** and would fail a **Skill Check**, you may reroll up to 2d6 to try and succeed. However if you still **fail** the check, you loss **Ambition** equal to the amount rolled on your **Ambition** die, this cannot be reduced.

feats.name: Battle Maneuvers
feats.description_markdown: You learned enough from other skilled warriors to learn from them. Gain one of the Fighter's **Manuvers** from their **Schools**, but may only use it once per **respite**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Offensive | **Cost** 2 AP
You learned enough from other skilled warriors to learn from them. Gain one of the Fighter's **Manuvers** from their **Schools**, but may only use it once per **respite**.

feats.name: Form Up
feats.description_markdown: When you're using a **shield** and an ally in your **engagement** is attacked, you may use your shield's **Reduction Pool** to take the damage.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Trigger | **Cost** - 
When you're using a **shield** and an ally in your **engagement** is attacked, you may use your shield's **Reduction Pool** to take the damage.

feats.name: Feeding An Army
feats.description_markdown: After finishing a **Long Rest**, you may choose to restore extra **Vitality** or **Ambition** equal to 1d4 to a total of allies not counting yourself, equal to your **Tier**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** - 
After finishing a **Long Rest**, you may choose to restore extra **Vitality** or **Ambition** equal to 1d4 to a total of allies not counting yourself, equal to your **Tier**.

feats.name: Triage
feats.description_markdown: You know how to close **Wounds**. After finishing a **Long Rest**, you may choose to restore **Wounds** equal to your **Tier** to a total of allies counting yourself, equal to your **Tier**. A creature can only be effected by this once per seven days.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** - 
You know how to close **Wounds**. After finishing a **Long Rest**, you may choose to restore **Wounds** equal to your **Tier** to a total of allies counting yourself, equal to your **Tier**. A creature can only be effected by this once per seven days.

feats.name: Seasoned Infantry
feats.description_markdown: You have fought in enough battles to know your favorite weapon. Choose a weapon type (short sword, spear, dagger, etc.), and gain **proficiency** with it. In addition you gain +1 to **attacks** and **damage** rolls.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Soldier Feats*
**Trait** Passive | **Cost** - 
You have fought in enough battles to know your favorite weapon. Choose a weapon type (short sword, spear, dagger, etc.), and gain **proficiency** with it. In addition you gain +1 to **attacks** and **damage** rolls.

feats.name: Stop The Bleeding
feats.description_markdown: You are able to heal your allies in a pinch. You restore **Vitality** equal to 2d4.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Soldier Feats*
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 2 AP + 2 Ambition | **Range** Touch
You are able to heal your allies in a pinch. You restore **Vitality** equal to 2d4.

feats.name: Motivational Leader
feats.description_markdown: You give hope to your allies. Only during a **rest**, you may spend **Ambition** to provide a temporary **Reduction Pool** equal to your **Will** + **Tier** and to a total of targets equal to your **Will**
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Soldier Feats*
**Trait** Narrative | **Cost** 1 Ambition
You give hope to your allies. Only during a **rest**, you may spend **Ambition** to provide a temporary **Reduction Pool** equal to your **Will** + **Tier** and to a total of targets equal to your **Will**

feats.name: Protect The Flank
feats.description_markdown: When in an **engagement** with allies, chose one ally within that **engagement** and you are both **immune** from **Flank** until either of you take a hostile action, or the duration ends.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *1 Soldier Feats*
**Trait** Utility | **Cost** 1 AP | **Duration** 1 Round
When in an **engagement** with allies, chose one ally within that **engagement** and you are both **immune** from **Flank** until either of you take a hostile action, or the duration ends.

feats.name: Angler
feats.description_markdown: You have learned how to tangle with the largest and come out on top. Using the **Grapple** action now only costs 1 **AP**
feats.raw_markdown:
**Activation** Passive  
You have learned how to tangle with the largest and come out on top. Using the **Grapple** action now only costs 1 **AP**

feats.name: Durable
feats.description_markdown: When you would suffer a **Critical** or **Critically Fail** a spell that would damage you, you may reduce it from a **Critical** to a **Normal** attack and suffer 2 **Wounds**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Path Investment** *2 Tier 1 Profession Feats*
**Trait** Trigger
When you would suffer a **Critical** or **Critically Fail** a spell that would damage you, you may reduce it from a **Critical** to a **Normal** attack and suffer 2 **Wounds**.

feats.name: Grit Your Teeth
feats.description_markdown: You gain an additional 1 **Wound** to your maximum **Wound** threshold.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You gain an additional 1 **Wound** to your maximum **Wound** threshold.

feats.name: Replenished Reservoir
feats.description_markdown: During rests you add your **Tier** when restoring **Reservoir**.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Required** *Spellcasting*
**Trait** Passive
During rests you add your **Tier** when restoring **Reservoir**.

feats.name: Pugilist
feats.description_markdown: You've been in enough fist fights to know how to defend yourself. When using unarmed or cestus weapons, add +1 to your **Armor** defense.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Activation** Passive  
You've been in enough fist fights to know how to defend yourself. When using unarmed or cestus weapons, add +1 to your **Armor** defense.

feats.name: Pack Mule
feats.description_markdown: You are able to carry more weight than the average adventurer. You gain +5 to your **Carry Weight** and gain an additional +2 when this feat is taken again.
feats.raw_markdown:
**Trait** Passive
You are able to carry more weight than the average adventurer. You gain +5 to your **Carry Weight** and gain an additional +2 when this feat is taken again.
